services.title: Beginner Lessons
services.body: Learn the basics of swimming for all ages.

services.title: Stroke Improvement
services.body: Refine your technique and improve your speed.

services.title: Safety Training
services.body: Learn essential lifesaving skills and techniques.

services.title: Swim for Weight Loss
services.body: Burn calories and lose weight in the water.

faqs.a: Yes, all our instructors are STA certified and first aid trained.
Absolutely. We provide personalized one-on-one swimming instruction.

faqs.q: What age groups do you teach?
faqs.a: We cater to all ages, from toddlers to adults.

faqs.q: How can I book a lesson?
faqs.a: You can call us or fill in our contact form — we'll get back to you shortly.
